content.full_text:
California
Fair Political
Practices Commission

August 21, 1990


Catherine R. Jasper
Jasper & Jasper
Attorneys at Law
Commerce Bank Building
1201 Dove Street, Sixth Floor
Newport Beach, CA 92660

Re: Your Request for Advice
Our File No. A-90-511

Dear Ms. Jasper:

I am writing in response to your letter requesting
confirmation of telephone advice which I provided you on July 31,
1990. Your letter accurately reflects our telephone conversation,
wherein we discussed Government Code Section 85803 and the use of
campaign funds for charitable donations. I advised you that
pursuant to this section, the recall campaign committee, which
would like to close its account, may make a donation to the
special education school for the purchase of a van.

I trust this answers your question.

Sincerely,

Scott Hallabrin
Acting General Counsel

By: Jill R. Stecher
Counsel, Legal Division

SH:JRS:plh


428 J Street, Suite 800 • P.O. Box 807 • Sacramento CA 95804-0807 • (916)322-5660

embedding.qa_text: This letter is from the California Fair Political Practices Commission and is dated August 21, 1990. It is addressed to Catherine R. Jasper at Jasper & Jasper Attorneys at Law, Commerce Bank Building, 1201 Dove Street, Sixth Floor, Newport Beach, CA 92660. The letter responds to Ms. Jasper's request for advice regarding confirmation of telephone advice provided on July 31, 1990. The Commission confirms that the recall campaign committee, which would like to close its account, may make a donation to the special education school for the purchase of a van pursuant to Government Code Section 85803. The letter concludes with the signature of Scott Hallabrin, Acting General Counsel, and is signed by Jill R. Stecher, Counsel, Legal Division. SH:JRS:plh
